title: Accessible Reader UI, Untrusted Markup, Safe Links, and Dynamic Status
description: React renders sanitized content inconsistently, source links can deceive, cards rely on color, live refresh steals focus, images lack useful alternatives, and narrow layouts clip metadata. Learners cumulatively produce content-safe inclusive research reader through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Treat every title, person, summary, content, image, category, language, date, and URL as untrusted even after XML validation.
Prefer text, isolate a versioned allowlist sanitizer for justified HTML, rewrite links, block active content, and test changed policies.
Use logical headings, landmarks, lists, source and date metadata, language, descriptive links, content warnings, and provenance.
